name: Chocolate Biscotti
recipeIngredient: Sugar (Sugar, divided into 1 1/4 cups and 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop 1/2 cup of hazelnuts and coarsely chop the rest; set aside.
2. In a double boiler, melt butter and chocolate; stir in vanilla and cool.
3. Beat egg yolks with half the sugar until thick and pale.
4. Fold in cooled chocolate mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, beat 3 egg whites, gradually adding the remaining sugar until stiff.
6. Mix flour with baking powder and fold into the liquid ingredients.
7. Fold in all the nuts.
8. Form dough into a loaf about 1 1/2 inches wide and 10 inches long.
9. Place on a lightly greased baking sheet; brush dough with egg white.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes, or until dough is set.
11. Remove loaf from baking sheet and cut into diagonal slices (1/2 inch).
12. Place slices on baking sheet, return to oven, and toast for 5 to 8 minutes on each side, or until slightly dry.
